name: Gilgamesh
desc: The King of Heroes from the dawn of human history, hailing from a world beyond the stars.\nPossessing a nature two-thirds divine and one-third mortal, he claims a natural-born prerogative to rule over all of creation.

1.name: He Who Saw the Deep
1.desc: When Gilgamesh holds "King's Acknowledgement," its DEF-ignoring effect also applies to other teammates, and "King's Acknowledgement" additionally increases Gilgamesh's ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When using Skill, additionally regenerates a fixed <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy.

2.name: Wisdom That Encompassed All
2.desc: When entering combat, Gilgamesh gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Interest." When using Ultimate, additionally gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "Interest." The DMG multiplier of the Skill "Gate of Babylon" against the primary target increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, and its DMG multiplier against adjacent targets increases by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Journey That Spanned Far
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

30000007.name: Energy Regeneration Rate
30000007.desc: Energy Regeneration Rate can boost the amount of Energy a character gains when performing actions such as using abilities, defeating enemies, or taking DMG.\nA higher rate means faster Energy regeneration.\nHowever, certain Energy-Regenerating effects won't be impacted by this rate.

5.name: Sword That Parted Gods from Man
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Soul That Bore Friendship
6.desc: Increases the bounce DMG multiplier of the Ultimate "Enuma Elish" by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. While Gilgamesh is on the field, increases ally characters' All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. When a teammate uses Ultimate, Gilgamesh gains 1 point of "Golden Rule," up to a total of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points. When this unit uses Ultimate, consumes all "Golden Rule" points, and each point of "Golden Rule" consumed increases the CRIT DMG for the Ultimate DMG dealt by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

150901.name: Halfhearted Blow
150901.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gilgamesh's ATK to one designated enemy.
150901.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

150902.name: Gate of Babylon
150902.desc: Gains "King's Acknowledgement," allowing this unit to ignore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of the target's DEF when dealing DMG, lasting for <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nDeals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gilgamesh's ATK to one designated enemy, and deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gilgamesh's ATK to adjacent targets.
150902.simple_desc: Gains "King's Acknowledgement," enabling this unit to ignore part of the target's DEF when dealing DMG. Deals Lightning DMG to one enemy and Lightning DMG to adjacent targets.

150903.name: Enuma Elish
150903.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gilgamesh's ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gilgamesh's ATK to one random enemy.
150903.simple_desc: Deals <color=#f29e38ff>massive Lightning DMG</color> to all enemies. Additionally deals minor Lightning DMG to random enemies, bouncing <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).

150904.name: "Amuse Me to the Fullest"
150904.desc: When a teammate uses their Ultimate, Gilgamesh gains "King's Burden," which increases Ultimate DMG dealt by this unit by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nInitially, automatically uses Basic ATK at the start of this unit's turn. When another ally target takes action, Gilgamesh gains 1 point of "Interest." For each point of "Interest" in possession, increases this unit's SPD by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.\nWhen "Interest" reaches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> for the first time, enters the "Interest Piqued!" state. In that state, can only use Skill, lasting for the entire battle. After using Skill, clears this unit's "Interest."
150904.simple_desc: When a teammate <color=#f29e38ff>uses their Ultimate</color>, Gilgamesh gains "King's Burden," which <color=#f29e38ff>increases Ultimate DMG dealt</color> by this unit.\nInitially, automatically uses Basic ATK at the start of this unit's turn. When another ally target takes action, Gilgamesh <color=#f29e38ff>gains 1 point of "Interest"</color>. For each point of "Interest" in possession, <color=#f29e38ff>increases SPD</color> for this unit.\nWhen "Interest" reaches <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> for the first time, enters the "Interest Piqued!" state. In that state, can only use Skill, lasting for the entire battle. After using Skill, clears this unit's "Interest."

150905.name: "I Grant You Permission To Strike"
150905.desc: When Gilgamesh or <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> attacks, the attack tally increases by 1. After any unit attacks, if the attack tally reaches <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>, Gilgamesh and <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> launch <u>Joint Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Gilgamesh's ATK and Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Saber's ATK to all enemies, respectively. Then, Gilgamesh gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Interest." <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> regenerates a fixed <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy, and the next time she uses Ultimate, the DMG dealt becomes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG.\nAfter using <u>Joint Follow-Up ATK</u>, resets the attack tally.
150905.simple_desc: When Gilgamesh or <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> attacks, the attack tally increases. After any unit attacks, if the attack tally reaches <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>, Gilgamesh and <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> launch <u>Joint Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing massive Lightning DMG and massive Wind DMG to all enemies. Gilgamesh <color=#f29e38ff>gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> "Interest."</color> <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> regenerates Energy and additionally increases the DMG of her next Ultimate.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000019.name: Joint Attack
10000019.desc: Multiple targets respectively use attacks on enemy targets in one action.

150906.name: Attack
150906.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

150907.name: Enkidu
150907.desc: After using Technique, creates 1 Special Dimension lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Enemies in the Special Dimension enter the "King's Permission" state. Enemies in the "King's Permission" state will cease all actions.\nWhen entering combat by actively attacking an enemy in the "King's Permission" state, causes all enemies in the "King's Permission" state to enter combat, and deals Lightning DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Gilgamesh's ATK to all enemies after entering combat. Gilgamesh also immediately gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Interest." Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
150907.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension. Enemies in the Special Dimension enter the "King's Permission" state and cease all actions.\nAttacking an enemy in the "King's Permission" state causes all enemies in the "King's Permission" state to enter combat simultaneously. After entering combat, deals Lightning DMG to all enemies and immediately <color=#f29e38ff>gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> "Interest."</color>

1.point_desc: When Gilgamesh uses Ultimate, gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Interest." When other ally characters use Ultimate, Gilgamesh additionally gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Interest" and regenerates a fixed amount of Energy equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the Energy consumed this time.
During the current battle, for every 1 point of "Interest" gained by Gilgamesh, increases his CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

While Gilgamesh is on the field, increases all ally targets' ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. If the target's Max Energy exceeds <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>, for every 1 excess point of Max Energy, additionally increases ATK and CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>, up to a maximum additional increase of <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>.
